onboarding.title: Tripatlas is waiting for the first sync
onboarding.description: As soon as the sync worker pulls in the first drive from TeslaMate, your home screen will appear here.
onboarding.step2: Is TESLAMATE_DATABASE_URL set correctly (read-only role on the TeslaMate database)?
onboarding.step3: The first sync takes a few minutes depending on drive history — just hang tight.
onboarding.demoHint: No car handy? With <compose>docker-compose.demo.yml</compose> (see <docs>docs/demo.md</docs>) you can try Tripatlas with sample data in a few minutes — no real vehicle needed.

vehicleCard.ratedRangeTitle: Rated range according to the vehicle
